creator: greg.bal4@gmail.com
text:
Marking as closed.  Short story: After playing around with things
I have discovered the problem is with the ctwm window manager.

Long story: After seeing the above report that a successful start
of firefox results in the same messages, I started looking at other
things.  One long standing issue I've had with ctwm is I have to
do a restart (f.restart) to get virtual screens to work.  So I did
a restart of ctwm and saw the firefox window briefly flash on the
screen.  Now suspecting ctwm I changed to twm and firefox started
up as expected.
